items.name: Neon Intuition
items.prediction: What looks chaotic now will sort itself out.

items.name: Prediction Shot
items.prediction: You don’t have to speed this up.

items.name: Signal Sip
items.prediction: Someone already sees it. They’re just not saying it yet.

items.name: Patch Incoming
items.prediction: That idea will come back. Stronger.

TRIGGER_ABOUT.title: Kasia.exe
TRIGGER_ABOUT.description: Dev, 3D and design in one body. I like clear systems and bold ideas.

TRIGGER_PROJECT.title: Projects Zone
TRIGGER_PROJECT.description: Code + design + a lot of iteration. See what I actually ship.

TRIGGER_PORTFOLIO.title: Contact Link
TRIGGER_PORTFOLIO.description: Got a project, a mission, or chaos to fix? Send a signal — I’ll ship the iteration.

TRIGGER_VISION_HOME.title: Back to base
TRIGGER_VISION_HOME.description: Reset to the lobby. No drama — just re-entry.

TRIGGER_PARKMETRE.title: Parking Meter: Final Boss
TRIGGER_PARKMETRE.description: Here even oxygen feels subscription-based. Relax — I’m still free tier… for now.
TRIGGER_PARKMETRE.description2: Free tier: active. Parking meter: offended.

TRIGGER_TRASH.title: Trash: Support 24/7
TRIGGER_TRASH.description: Throw a problem in — it’ll come back as a production bug. Circle of life.

TRIGGER_CAR.title: Car
TRIGGER_CAR.description: Parked perfectly. Since 2019. Record still unbeaten.
TRIGGER_CAR.description2: Thanks, not a car — a monument to stability.

TRIGGER_DRINK_COFFEE.title: Coffee
TRIGGER_DRINK_COFFEE.description: Won’t solve problems. But gives +10 focus.

TRIGGER_DRINK_DISTRIBUTOR.title: Vending Machine
TRIGGER_DRINK_DISTRIBUTOR.description: You press and ask a question. Something happens... ⚠️ The machine has moods.

TRIGGER_BUS.title: Bus to Nowhere
TRIGGER_BUS.description: It always arrives… once you stop waiting. Relatable.
TRIGGER_BUS.description2: We did warn you it’s not coming…

TRIGGER_STAIRS.title: Premium Stairs
TRIGGER_STAIRS.description: They exist. They lead somewhere. Not today.

TRIGGER_FIRE.title: Campfire
TRIGGER_FIRE.description: Fire: on. Chair: present. Missing: marshmallows.
TRIGGER_FIRE.description2: Yes, this is therapy. For free.

TRIGGER_NOTHING.title: Fixed point
TRIGGER_NOTHING.description: Nothing will happen here. And that’s okay.
